repair_rejections.title: Temporary one-day closure of Prestwich Library on Sunday 14 June
quality_errors: draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 13.

repair_rejections.title: Joe & The Juice is taking over Manchester with three new city openings this summer - About Manchester
quality_errors: draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 12.

repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • Foreigner отмечают 50-летие группы эксклюзивным туром, который пройдёт 11 июня 2026 года в AO Arena. Группа исполнит свои величайшие хиты, включая 'I Want To Know What Love Is' и 'Cold As Ice'.
